name: CoreClaw Google Maps Leads Starter Global

parameters.content:
## CoreClaw Google Maps Leads - Starter Global

Searches CoreClaw Store, selects the Google Maps keyword scraper, reads details/version/schema, generates campaign config, starts a run, and returns `run_slug`.

After import, select your own CoreClaw API credential on each CoreClaw node.

nodes.name: Search CoreClaw Scrapers
nodes.notes: Select your own CoreClaw API credential after importing this workflow.

nodes.name: Get Current Scraper Details
nodes.notes: Select your own CoreClaw API credential after importing this workflow.

nodes.name: Start CoreClaw Run
nodes.notes: Select your own CoreClaw API credential after importing this workflow.
